evals.prompt: Summarize the git status and diff of the current branch to draft a PR description.
evals.expected_output: A structured PR description following the template with Summary, Proposed Changes, Testing, and Impact sections.

evals.prompt:
Summarize the following terminal test failure log for a PR comment:

27 failed
[chromium] › tests/provider.spec.ts:889:1 › decision modal — defer shows schedule follow-up input
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 5000ms exceeded.
  at openDecisionModal (tests/provider.spec.ts:718:14)
  at tests/provider.spec.ts:894:9
evals.expected_output: A structured PR comment summarizing the test failure with status, pipeline status, and failure details.
